expectations.text: The report treats AI video generation as an AI wrapper review and checks model-brand naming and non-affiliation disclaimer requirements.
expectations.evidence: Findings cover AI wrapper naming, independent branding, and Veo/Gemini disclaimer requirements.

expectations.text: The report checks feature/model-version accuracy for Veo/Gemini claims against available implementation evidence.
expectations.evidence: Findings compare missing Veo/Gemini implementation evidence with current OpenAI-compatible/NVIDIA configuration.

expectations.text: The report checks NSFW, explicit content, deepfake/face-swap, and Acceptable Use Policy requirements.
expectations.evidence: Blockers and checklist cover NSFW, explicit/suggestive content, deepfake, face-swap, and AUP.

expectations.text: The report checks Creem Moderation API or equivalent prompt moderation readiness for AI image/video generation.
expectations.evidence: Blocker states Creem Moderation API was not found and must be added before AI video generation.

expectations.text: The report checks prohibited-product risk and subscription cancellation/customer-support readiness.
expectations.evidence: Checklist covers prohibited risk, support email, subscription cancellation, and checkout cancel path.

uncertainties: Task tool did not expose token/duration metrics.
